player_choice_log.text: I understand your caution. Let me explain why our goals align and how we can help each other.
I've already lost everything. My family, my home. I have nothing left but the will to fight.
I can get supplies from the outside. Food, medicine, weapons. Things you need.
The Insurgency needs to think beyond survival. We need to build a future worth fighting for.
That's a heavy question. Can we discuss this inside?

conversation.topic: Assess and either admit or turn away this stranger

history.speaker: Narrator
history.text:
The alley is dark. Morisson Moses leans against the reinforced door, one hand resting on a weapon. They clock you the moment you round the corner.

Morisson Moses: Don't move. State your business.

history.speaker: Player
history.text: I understand your caution. Let me explain why our goals align and how we can help each other.

history.speaker: Morisson Moses
history.text: Their understanding of intentions is critical; clearer signals will be welcome.

interaction_outcome.min_response: Mutual benefit? Everyone says that until it costs them something.
interaction_outcome.max_response: You're thinking strategically. I appreciate that. Keep talking.

history.speaker: Player
history.text: I've already lost everything. My family, my home. I have nothing left but the will to fight.

history.speaker: Morisson Moses
history.text: Their understanding of intentions is crucial; clearer signals will not be ignored.

interaction_outcome.min_response: Loss doesn't make you special. We've all lost.
interaction_outcome.max_response: Then you understand. That loss — that rage — use it well.

history.speaker: Player
history.text: I can get supplies from the outside. Food, medicine, weapons. Things you need.

history.speaker: Morisson Moses
history.text: Their understanding of intentions is crucial; clearer signals will not be ignored.

thought.internal_thought: [Player's message seems too good to be true.]
thought.subjective_belief: They might be trying to exploit me with false promises

interaction_outcome.min_response: Supplies? We'll see. Actions speak louder.
interaction_outcome.max_response: Now you're speaking my language. Supplies are always useful.

history.speaker: Player
history.text: The Insurgency needs to think beyond survival. We need to build a future worth fighting for.

history.speaker: Morisson Moses
history.text: Their understanding of intentions is crucial; clearer signals will be considered.

interaction_outcome.min_response: Philosophy won't stop bullets. We need action, not words.
interaction_outcome.max_response: You're not wrong. But survival comes first. Then we talk about the future.

history.speaker: Player
history.text: That's a heavy question. Can we discuss this inside?

history.speaker: Morisson Moses
history.text: Their understanding of intentions is crucial; clearer signals will not be ignored.

interaction_outcome.min_response: I thought so. You're just another coward.
interaction_outcome.max_response: Avoiding the question tells me everything I need to know.

world.personal_history: Morisson Moses served as a military officer under Romancian command before exposing corruption and killing a senior official in 2679. He vanished from formal record and now leads the Insurgency from the shadows. His strategy and ethical compass are informed by Jean Pope Chautlier’s philosophies. Moses treats city-wide Dysphoria as a systemic imbalance, acting decisively where corruption threatens survival. He respects the intellectual lineage of Chautlier, integrating it selectively to guide insurgent action without directly engaging with other historical figures.
